country:
Argentina, Austria, Belgium, Brazil, Canada
llm_prompt.user_question: show me top 10 countries with their highest total_order value

generated_sql:
SELECT T1.country, ROUND(SUM(T2.freight),2) AS total_order_value
FROM customers AS T1
JOIN orders AS T2
ON T1.customer_id = T2.customer_id
GROUP BY T1.country
ORDER BY total_order_value DESC
LIMIT 10
